channel.title: Elira Living
channel.description: Vegan, ECOCERT COSMOS-certified natural skincare & haircare. Made in the EU.

item.g:title: Sensitive Moisturizing Cream
item.g:description: A fragrance-free moisturiser with skin-loving glycerin and betaine that drench reactive skin in lasting moisture. Calms redness and reinforces a stronger, more resilient barrier with every use — leaving skin soft, comfortable and never tight. ECOCERT COSMOS Organic, vegan, for sensitive skin.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Skin Care

item.g:title: Radiant Glow Facial Cleanser
item.g:description: A gentle daily cleanser that melts away makeup, impurities and excess oil without ever stripping the skin. Leaves your complexion clean, fresh and visibly radiant — never tight or squeaky — so it's a pleasure to use morning and night. COSMOS Natural, vegan, for all skin types.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Skin Care

item.g:title: Purifying Toner
item.g:description: A purifying toner with soothing lavender water, hydrating cucumber and a touch of gentle salicylic acid (BHA) that clears pores and balances oily, combination skin. Refines and refreshes for a smoother, more even, shine-free finish — without the sting. 99% natural origin, fragrance-free, COSMOS Natural, vegan.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Skin Care

item.g:title: Sensitive Scalp Shampoo
item.g:description: A gentle, sulfate-free shampoo with mild coconut-derived cleansers, nourishing plum extract and calming linden flower for sensitive, easily-irritated scalps. Soothes itch and tightness while leaving hair soft, clean and manageable — kind enough for everyday washing. Dermatologically tested, 98% natural origin, COSMOS Natural, vegan, for all hair types.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Hair Care

item.g:title: Retinol Alternative Serum
item.g:description: A gentle natural anti-aging serum with 2% Bidens Pilosa — a plant-based retinol alternative — plus hyaluronic acid. Visibly refines skin texture and softens fine lines and dark spots, without irritation. COSMOS Natural, vegan, for all skin types.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Skin Care

item.g:title: Peptide Anti-Aging Serum
item.g:description: A luxurious smoothing serum with 2% Hexapeptide-11 and 1% Ginkgo Biloba, plus hyaluronic acid and antioxidant-rich blueberry and strawberry seed oils. Visibly softens fine lines and wrinkles for plumper, firmer, more elastic skin — with a delicate floral aroma. COSMOS Natural, vegan, for normal to dry skin.
item.g:google_product_category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Skin Care
